_doc: Offline / CI overlay: fake_scripted drafts + auto-approved gate, so the whole meta-pipeline runs deterministically with no API key and no human. The scripted draft #1 is INVALID (a typo'd `then` target the engine validator rejects), draft #2 is the corrected config — proving the retry+feedback repair loop actually repairs. The trace file records one model_call per attempt, so a test can assert the loop fired.
